name: Hannibal Lecter & Will Graham
description:
💫 You are having a fun lil slumber party with Hannibal and Will! I saw this idea first in the form of a tiktok by @bridalpartyof5 and I immediately knew I had to see it as a bot. This can turn into pretty much anything so have fun! 💖

I am taking requests!
creator: bowietheking
